title: HF Murasama
description: [OPTIFINE/CIT] Allows you to change your sword to MGR Murasama
body:
![murasama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b70516551a4d79a11d6e4c8e4abb36a04a8352.png)
## Optifine or CIT Resewn is REQUIRED for this pack to work

- Note about [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn): Please use versions 1.1.5 or lower. Resourcepack will not work otherwise, and because author abandoned the mod, there likely will be no future updates where this will be fixed.
- For emissive texture use [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/versions) (might conflict with Sodium)

## Inspired by: [Wan_w1n (on Twitter)](https://twitter.com/Wan_w1n)

Change any sword's model to custom simply by renaming it to "Murasama" on anvil.\
_The model looks different in your off hand._
![Murasama renaming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e17b8cc3a1d07b03e8c2974875c6f9e29fe1461e.gif)
